---
title: "H2B_Final"

In this file we run a fischers-exact test to determine co-deificency prevalance within the cohort at age 28 months. 

Chatgpt (Codex) version 26.7 was utlized to generate 2x2 table code. 

Table plot is generated at the end of the document. 
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(washbgam)
library(washb)
library(devtools)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
install.packages("car")
library(car)


setwd("/Users/sumuccu/Micronutrient-Telomere")


rm(list=ls())

source(here("0-config.R"))

d <- read.csv("/Users/sumuccu/Desktop/bangladesh-merged-eed-mn-data.csv")


d <- d %>%
  select(lowfer, lowfer_inf, highsTFR, iron_def, irondef_inf , irondefanemia, irondefanemia_inf, vit_A_def, B12def, folatedef, delta_TS_Z,     
         logFER_inf, hemo_eeel, hepcidin_eeel,
         logsTFR_inf, logRBP_inf, logB12, logfolate, clusterid, TS_t3_Z, sex, age, 
         birthord, momage, momheight, momedu, hfiacat, Nlt18, Ncomp, watmin, walls, floor, HHwealth_scaled, tr, 
         life_viol_any_t3_cat, viol_any_preg_cat, sumscore_t0_mom_Z)

# Restrict H2B co-deficiency analyses to the telomere-available analytic sample.
d <- d %>%
  filter(!is.na(TS_t3_Z))

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)

dir.create(here("results", "H2B"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

validate_binary_deficiency <- function(x, var_name) {
  observed <- sort(unique(stats::na.omit(x)))
  if (length(observed) == 0 || !all(observed %in% c(0, 1))) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Variable ", var_name, " is not coded as binary 0/1. Observed values: ",
        paste(observed, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }
  
  as.integer(x)
}

# --------------------------
# Choose binary deficiency variables
# --------------------------
pair_list <- list(
  c("lowfer_inf", "vit_A_def"),
  c("highsTFR", "vit_A_def"),
  c("irondefanemia_inf", "vit_A_def"),
  c("lowfer_inf", "B12def"),
  c("highsTFR", "B12def"),
  c("lowfer_inf", "folatedef"),
  c("highsTFR", "folatedef"),
  c("vit_A_def", "B12def"),
  c("vit_A_def", "folatedef"),
  c("B12def", "folatedef")
)

# --------------------------
# Figure-ready names
# --------------------------
figure_names_pairs <- c(
  lowfer_inf = "Low ferritin",
  highsTFR = "High sTfR",
  irondefanemia_inf = "Iron deficiency anemia",
  vit_A_def = "Vitamin A deficiency",
  B12def = "Vitamin B12 deficiency",
  folatedef = "Folate deficiency"
)

# --------------------------
# Check variables exist
# --------------------------
pair_vars <- unique(unlist(pair_list))
missing_vars <- setdiff(pair_vars, colnames(d))

if(length(missing_vars) > 0){
  stop(paste("These variables are missing from d:", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", ")))
}

# --------------------------
# Fisher test + prevalence table
# --------------------------
pair_prev_test_res <- NULL

for (k in seq_along(pair_list)) {
  
  v1 <- pair_list[[k]][1]
  v2 <- pair_list[[k]][2]
  
  d_sub <- d %>%
    select(all_of(c(v1, v2))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[v1]]), !is.na(.data[[v2]]))
  
  x <- validate_binary_deficiency(d_sub[[v1]], v1)
  y <- validate_binary_deficiency(d_sub[[v2]], v2)
  
  # 2x2 table
  tab <- table(
    factor(x, levels = c(0, 1)),
    factor(y, levels = c(0, 1))
  )
  
  # Fisher's exact test
  ft <- fisher.test(tab)
  
  # Counts
  n00 <- tab[1, 1]
  n01 <- tab[1, 2]
  n10 <- tab[2, 1]
  n11 <- tab[2, 2]
  
  n_complete <- sum(tab)
  n_def1 <- n10 + n11
  n_def2 <- n01 + n11
  n_both <- n11
  
  prev_def1 <- n_def1 / n_complete
  prev_def2 <- n_def2 / n_complete
  prev_both <- n_both / n_complete
  expected_both_indep <- prev_def1 * prev_def2
  obs_exp_ratio <- ifelse(expected_both_indep > 0, prev_both / expected_both_indep, NA_real_)
  
  res <- data.frame(
    def1 = v1,
    def2 = v2,
    pair_label = paste0(unname(figure_names_pairs[v1]), " + ", unname(figure_names_pairs[v2])),
    n_complete = n_complete,
    n_ts_complete = nrow(d),
    n00 = n00,
    n01 = n01,
    n10 = n10,
    n11 = n11,
    n_def1 = n_def1,
    n_def2 = n_def2,
    n_both = n_both,
    prev_def1 = prev_def1,
    prev_def2 = prev_def2,
    prev_both = prev_both,
    expected_both_indep = expected_both_indep,
    obs_exp_ratio = obs_exp_ratio,
    odds_ratio = unname(ft$estimate),
    or_lb = ft$conf.int[1],
    or_ub = ft$conf.int[2],
    p_value = ft$p.value
  )
  
  pair_prev_test_res <- bind_rows(pair_prev_test_res, res)
}

# Optional multiple-testing correction
pair_prev_test_res <- pair_prev_test_res %>%
  mutate(
    p_fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr"),
    sig_raw = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    sig_fdr = case_when(
      p_fdr < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_fdr < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_fdr < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    sig_plot = case_when(
      sig_fdr != "" ~ paste0(sig_fdr, " FDR"),
      sig_raw != "" ~ paste0(sig_raw, " raw"),
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(prev_both))

pair_prev_test_res

write.csv(pair_prev_test_res, here("results", "H2B", "H2B_pair_prevalence_fisher.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```
```{r}
p_pair_prev <- ggplot(pair_prev_test_res, aes(x = pair_label, y = prev_both)) +
  geom_col(fill = analysis_palette["primary"], alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n_both)),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3, color = analysis_palette["neutral"]) +
  geom_text(aes(y = prev_both + 0.002, label = sig_plot),
            hjust = 0, size = 3.5, color = analysis_palette["secondary"]) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100, 1), "%"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Co-deficiency pair",
    y = "Co-deficiency prevalence",
    title = "Co-deficiency prevalence by micronutrient pair",
    subtitle = "Restricted to children with non-missing telomere length z-score"
  ) +
  theme_analysis_plot() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(here("results", "H2B", "H2B_pair_prevalence_barplot.png"),
       p_pair_prev, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)

print(p_pair_prev)
```
